# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVER', description: 'Production server address')
    }
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = 'artifacts'
        DEPLOY_DIR = '/opt/deploy'
        CREDENTIALS_ID = 'production-server-credentials'
    }
    stages {
        stage('Validate Input') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL.startsWith('https://') && !params.ARTIFACT_URL.startsWith('http://')) {
                        error('Invalid URL: Must start with http:// or https://')
                    }
                    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVER.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$')) {
                        error('Invalid server address')
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    sh "curl --fail --silent --show-error --location '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}' --output ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sshagent([env.CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        sh """
                            scp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/artifact ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER}:${DEPLOY_DIR}/
                            ssh ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVER} 'sudo systemctl restart myapp'
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
